Sequence similarities: SIMILARITY: Belongs to the methyltransferase TylF/MycF family. {ECO:0000305}.
Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=macrocin + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = tylosin + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine + H(+); Xref=Rhea:RHEA:17269, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789, ChEBI:CHEBI:76820, ChEBI:CHEBI:77047; EC=2.1.1.101; Evidence={ECO:0000269|PubMed:3170601, ECO:0000269|PubMed:3479787};
Function [CC]: FUNCTION: O-methyltransferase that catalyzes the conversion of macrocin to tylosin, the ultimate step of tylosin antibiotic biosynthesis. Also able to mediate the conversion of lactenocin to desmycosin. {ECO:0000269|PubMed:10220165, ECO:0000269|PubMed:10510490, ECO:0000269|PubMed:3170601, ECO:0000269|PubMed:3479787}.
